query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'orders' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qjSsefs24zghQG.d5f38dec7f6c --database YZ9v9D6zNEEycYVBBKJ8og --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'orders' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
